result.stdout:
Error: USAGE: NativeTest [--help] [info [<files>...]] [unpack <dir> <arch> <os>]
                  [--remove-zip]

OPTIONS:

    info [<files>...]     Display information about native dependencies in .dll
                          or .nupkg files
    unpack <dir> <arch> <os>
                          Unpack native dependencies to a directory for a
                          specific architecture and OS
    --remove-zip, -r      Remove the native.zip from DLLs after unpacking
    --help                display this list of options.
